Class RelationshipEdge

java.lang.Object
edu.princeton.cs.algs4.DirectedEdge
models.RelationshipEdge
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<RelationshipEdge>
public class RelationshipEdge extends edu.princeton.cs.algs4.DirectedEdge implements Comparable<RelationshipEdge>
Represents a relationship edge in the streaming graph. Extends DirectedEdge to be compatible with algs4 pathfinding algorithms.
